info.name: E-Commerce Checkout API
info.description: Complete checkout flow with items and shipping address

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "user-12345",
  "totalPrice": 40970000,
  "items": [
    {
      "productId": "prod-iphone-15",
      "productName": "iPhone 15 Pro",
      "productImage": "https://example.com/iphone-15-pro.jpg",
      "quantity": 1,
      "price": 29990000,
      "variantId": "variant-color-space-black"
    },
    {
      "productId": "prod-airpods",
      "productName": "AirPods Pro Gen 2",
      "productImage": "https://example.com/airpods-pro.jpg",
      "quantity": 2,
      "price": 5490000,
      "variantId": null
    }
  ],
  "shippingAddress": {
    "fullName": "Nguyễn Văn A",
    "phoneNumber": "0912345678",
    "street": "123 Đường Đinh Tiên Hoàng",
    "ward": "Bến Thành",
    "district": "Quận 1",
    "province": "TP. Hồ Chí Minh",
    "postalCode": "700000",
    "isDefault": true
  }
}

request.description: Create a complete order with items and shipping address
Simple test order with minimal data
Get specific order details with items and shipping address
